privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a synthetic FreeScout help desk environment where a support specialist must close 3 resolved conversations (Printer driver, VPN access, Password reset) while keeping 2 open (Network latency, Laptop request). The task is relevant to Computer User Support Specialists (BLS 15-1232) in the Computer and Mathematical occupations. All metadata values match the setup scripts and verifier logic. The pass threshold is 60 points, verified in both task.json and verifier.py.
